GlobalLimitExec: skip=0, fetch=100
  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[count(*)]
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[count(*)]
        GpuProjectExec: expr=[]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(s_store_sk@0, ss_store_sk@0)]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_store_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
                    GpuFilterExec: predicate=s_store_name@1 = ese, projection=[0]
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=53687091
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_store_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
                    GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(t_time_sk@0, ss_sold_time_sk@0)], projection=[2]
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([t_time_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
                            GpuFilterExec: predicate=t_hour@1 = 20 AND t_minute@2 >= 30, projection=[0]
                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                GpuScanExec: batch_size=53687091
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_sold_time_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(hd_demo_sk@0, ss_hdemo_sk@1)], projection=[1, 3]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([hd_demo_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
                                    GpuFilterExec: predicate=hd_dep_count@1 = 7, projection=[0]
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=53687091
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=53687091
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_hdemo_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=53687091
--- memory ---
GlobalLimitExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
  GpuAggregateExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
        GpuProjectExec: row_width=1, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
            GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                    GpuFilterExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
                        GpuScanExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                    GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
                            GpuFilterExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
                              GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=12, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
                                GpuScanExec: row_width=12, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                            GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
                                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
                                    GpuFilterExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8
                                        GpuScanExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=12, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
                                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=12, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
                                  GpuScanExec: row_width=12, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
